description: Annual fall contest covering all ARRL and RAC sections. Exchange is serial number, precedence, callsign, check, and section.

rulesConfig.check_format: Two digits representing the last two digits of the year first licensed
rulesConfig.notes: ARRL Sweepstakes Phone is held the first full weekend in November; CW is the second full weekend in November. 83 sections are the maximum multiplier.
